name: Tomato-Bread Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bread slices with butter; cut into large cubes.
2. Arrange the cubes on a jelly roll pan.
3. Toast in a 350 degree oven for about 7 minutes.
4. Place half of the cubes in a greased 9x13x2 inch baking dish.
5. Drain canned tomatoes, reserving liquid.
6. Mix together half of the cottage cheese, half of the olive oil, half of the drained tomatoes, half of the salt, half of the oregano, and half of the garlic powder.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake an additional 5 minutes to brown the top.
